mapper.sql: id, name, type, risk_level, strategy_code, feature_tags, status, creator_id, current_version_no, published_version_no, last_reject_comment, created_at, updated_at
mapper.update: update app.advisor_product set name = #{name}, type = #{type}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, strategy_code = #{strategyCode}, feature_tags = #{featureTags}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update app.advisor_product set status = #{status}, current_version_no = #{currentVersionNo}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update app.advisor_product set status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update app.advisor_product set status = #{status}, published_version_no = #{publishedVersionNo}, last_reject_comment = null, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
update app.advisor_product set status = #{status}, last_reject_comment = #{lastRejectComment}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select count(1) from app.advisor_product where status = #{status}
